case.title: User should be redirected to the For engineers page by clicking the logo in the header from any page
User is able to view the registration form immediately upon opening the For engineers page
User is able to register using Google social account
User is able to register using LinkedIn social account
User is able to register using GitHub social account
User is able to register using Email
The user is able to log in by clicking the [GET OFFERS] button with filled required fields
The user is able to log in by pressing an Enter button with filled required fields
User is able to be redirected to the Jobs page by clicking the [APPLY] button
User is able to be redirected to the specific company's vacancies on the Jobs page by clicking the [APPLY] button
User is able to navigate to the Jobs page by clicking the [Discover] button
User is able to view at least 10 feedbacks within the feedback carousel
User is able to view three columns of vacancies specifically for Web3 developers in the footer
User is able to view the logos of the top 5 companies in the footer
User is able to navigate to a specific company's vacancies by clicking its logo in the footer
User is able to be redirected to the TOP 100 WEB3 COMPANIES page by clicking the [VIEW TOP 100] button
User is able to view a table containing exactly 100 companies
User is able to see companies split into groups of 10
User is able to be redirected to the Jobs page with vacancies of a specific company by clicking its icon
User is able to be redirected to the Candidates list with an applied filter corresponding to the clicked link
User is able to be redirected to the Jobs page with an applied filter corresponding to the clicked specific vacancy link
User is able to be redirected to the Jobs page with salary information corresponding to the clicked specific vacancy link
User is able to open the Terms of use PDF document via "Terms of use" link
User is able to open the Cookies policy PDF document via "Cookies policy" link
User is able to open the Privacy policy PDF document via "Privacy policy" link
User is able to navigate to the About us page via "About us" link
User is able to navigate to the FAQ page via "FAQ" link
User is able to navigate to the Pricing page via "Pricing" link
User is able to navigate to the official Telegram page via the "Telegram" icon link
User is able to navigate to the official Signal page via the "Signal" icon link
User is able to be redirected to the For engineers page by clicking the "Huntd" logo in the footer
User is able to navigate to the official LinkedIn page via the "LinkedIn" icon link
User is able to navigate to the official Facebook page via the "Facebook" icon link
User is able to navigate to the official Twitter page via the "Twitter" icon link
User is able to navigate to the official Instagram page via the "Instagram" icon link
User is able to redirect to the candidates page by clicking [HIRE ENGINEERS] button
User is able to see CEO quotes in the For companies page
User is able to view a comparison table with other resources
User is able to navigate to the Candidates page by clicking the [HIRE TOP ENGINEERS] button
User is able to see partner logos in the For companies page
User is able to navigate to the Candidates page by clicking the [HIRE NOW] button
Unauthorized user is unable to use filters on the Candidates page
Unauthorized user is able to view filters on the Candidates page
Unauthorized user is able to trigger a sign up suggestion by hovering over the filters section
Unauthorized user is able to trigger a sign in suggestion by hovering over the filters section
User is able to be redirected to the Sign up page by clicking the [VIEW 2509 MORE CANDIDATES] button
Unauthorized user is unable to post a job on the Jobs page
Unauthorized user is able to trigger a sign up suggestion by clicking the "POST A JOB" dropdown
User is able to be redirected to the TOP 100 WEB3 COMPANIES page by clicking the [TOP COMPANIES] button
User is able to view relevant vacancy offers by clicking a specific tag on the Jobs page
User is able to open job details by clicking on the vacancy prerview
Unauthorized user is able to trigger a sign up suggestion by clicking the [1-CLICK APPLY] button

section.name: "Stay on top of web3 jobs" Form

case.title: User is able to select values from "Desired roles" dropdown in the "Stay on top of web3 jobs" form
User is able to select values from "Your experience" dropdown in the "Stay on top of web3 jobs" form
User is unable to submit the subscription form with an empty "Email" field
When the user leaves Email field empty, that validation message should be shown: “Email is required”
User is not able to submit the subscription form using an invalid email form
User is able to submit the subscription form with a valid email address
User is able to adjust the annual salary range using the slider
When the user clicks the [RECEIVE JOBS] button with valid data, the success message should be shown: "Subscription created"
Unauthorized user is able to trigger a sign up suggestion by clicking the [View more] button
User should not be able to Sign in with unregistered Email
The user should not be able to sign in without filling in the Email field
The password field should mask the input with asterisks
The user should not be able to log in without filling in the Password field
When the user leaves Password field empty, that validation message should be shown: “Password is required”
User is unable to sign in with invalid data in the "Password" field
User is able to toggle password visibility by clicking the "Show/Hide password" icon
The user is able to log in by clicking the [Sign In] button with filled required fields
The user is able to log in by pressing an Enter button with filled required fields
User is able to be redirected to the password recovery page by clicking the "Forgot the password" link
User is able to sign in via Google account by clicking the [Google] button
User is able to sign in via LinkedIn account by clicking the [LinkedIn] button
User is able to sign in via GitHub account by clicking the [GitHub] button
User should be redirected to the Sign Up page after clicking on "Sign Up" link
User is able to choose between Recruiter or Candidate roles after entering credentials on the Sign up page
The user should not be able to sign up without filling in the "Email" field
User is not able to sign up using an invalid email form
The "Email" field should not accept an already registered Email
When a user enters an email that is already taken, that validation message should be shown to the user: “Email is already taken.”
The user should not be able to sign up without filling in the "Password" field
The user should not be able to sign up without filling in the "Repeat Password" field
The "Repeat password" field should not accept values different from the "Password" field
The user is able to finish registration by clicking the [CREATE ACCOUNT] button with filled required fields

section.name: [CANDIDATE hunting for interesting job offers] button

case.title: User is unable to continue with an empty "Desired position" field
User is unable to continue without selecting a value from the "Desired roles" dropdown
User is unable to continue with an empty "Core technical skills" field
User is unable to proceed with 4 skills selected in the "Core technical skills" field
User is able to proceed with 5 skills selected in the "Core technical skills" field
User is able to proceed with 6 skills selected in the "Core technical skills" field
User is able to proceed with 14 skills selected in the "Core technical skills" field
User is able to proceed with 15 skills selected in the "Core technical skills" field
User is unable to proceed with 16 skills selected in the "Core technical skills" field
User is able to select any suggested skill from the "Core technical skills" suggestion list
User is able to select only valid technical skills from the "Core technical skills" suggestion list
User is able to view a tooltip message by hovering over the "i" info icon in the "Core technical skills" field
User is able to proceed to the next onboarding step by clicking the [SAVE AND CONTINUE] button
User is able to toggle between monthly and annual salary types in the "Desired base salary" toggle
User is able to select between USD and EUR currencies
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Desired salary in $" field
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Job experience" dropdown
User is unable to proceed with an empty "English level" dropdown
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Your location" field
User is able to access the "Desired offices locations" field by selecting the "Office" checkbox
User is able to import profile data via LinkedIn integration
User is unable to submit the "Link to my LinkedIn profile" field with an invalid URL format
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Link to my LinkedIn profile" field

section.name: "I grant permission to fetch and store my experience data to Huntd" checkbox

case.title: User is unable to proceed without selecting the "I grant permission to fetch and store my experience data to Huntd" checkbox
User is able to return to the experience import selection by clicking the "Delete" icon
User is able to enter data into the "Role" field manually
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Role" field
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Company name" field
User is able to view a tooltip message by hovering over the "Huntd" icon
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Start date Month" dropdown
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Start date Year" field
User is unable to proceed with a future date in the "Start date Year" field
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Month" dropdown
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Year" field
User is able to proceed with an empty "Achievements" field
User is able to edit their job experience by clicking the "Edit" icon
User is able to delete their job experience by clicking the "Delete" icon
User is redirected to the experience import selection page after deleting the only added job experience
User is able to add a new job experience by clicking the [+ ADD] button
User is able to upload experience data from LinkedIn by clicking the [RELOAD] button
User is able to upload experience data from LinkedIn by clicking the [FETCH] button
User is unable to proceed after deleting the only added job experience
User is redirected to the example page by clicking on the "Frontend Engineer" link
User is redirected to the example page by clicking on the "Mobile Engineer" link
User is redirected to the example page by clicking on the "Backend Engineer" link
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Achievements / Key results" field
User is able to view text examples by clicking on the "EXAMPLE" dropdown
User is able to proceed with an empty "Expectations from work (optional)" field
User is able to select an NFT avatar by clicking the "Profile" icon

section.name: "Wallet address to receive free NFT" field

case.title: User is able to receive an NFT avatar to the address provided in the "Wallet address to receive free NFT" field
User is able to proceed with an empty "Wallet address to receive free NFT" field
User is able to upload a profile photo by clicking the "UPLOAD YOUR PHOTO" link
User is able to upload a profile photo by clicking the "Profile" icon
User is unable to proceed with an empty "First name" field
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Last name" field
User is able to attach a CV by clicking the [ATTACH CV] button
User is able to proceed with an empty "Linkedin (optional)" field
User is able to proceed with an empty "Behance (optional)" field
User is able to proceed with an empty "GitHub (optional)" field

section.name: "Congrats, your Hunter profile is all set!" feedback form

case.title: User is able to set a proficiency level by dragging the "Experience rating" slider

section.name: "How can we make the profile creation process better?" textarea

case.title: User is able to proceed with an empty feedback textarea when a high rating is set on the "Experience rating" slider
User is unable to proceed with an empty feedback textarea when a low rating is set on the "Experience rating" slider
User is redirected to their profile with the "Review takes up to 24 hours" account status after successful registration
User is able to copy their account link by clicking the "Personal account" link
User is able to copy their account link by clicking the [COPY PROFILE LINK] button
User is unable to proceed with an empty "My role" field
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Company" field

section.name: "Wallet address to receive free NFT" field

case.title: User is unable to proceed with an empty "First name" field
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Last name" field
User is able to select any suggested option from the "Role" dropdown
User is able to proceed with an empty "Role" dropdown
User is able to proceed with an empty "Technologies" field
User is able to select any suggested option from the "Technologies" field
User is able to toggle between "Desired base salary ANNUAL / MONTHLY" options
User is able to adjust the "Salary range" slider to set expected compensation
User is able to proceed with an empty "English level" dropdown
User is able to select any suggested option from the "English level" dropdown
User is able to hide the interactive map by switching the "Show map" toggle
User is able to set a timezone by adjusting the "Map range" slider
User is able to select a location by entering data into the "Select city or country" field
User is able to proceed with an empty "Job experience" dropdown
User is able to select any suggested option from the "Job experience" dropdown
User is able to proceed by clicking the [NEXT] button provided that at least one dropdown, field or slider is filled/adjusted
User is unable to proceed with an empty "Template message" textarea
User is able to add a title by clicking the "Add to templates" checkbox
User is unable to proceed with an empty ‘’Add template title’’ field
User is redirected to the Chat page after filling in all required fields and clicking the [SEND] button
User is redirected to the Candidates page after filling in all required fields and clicking the "REACH OUT TO ... ENGINEERS MANUALLY" link
User is able to proceed without filling in required fields by clicking the "REACH OUT TO ... ENGINEERS MANUALLY" link
User should be redirected to the Sign In page after clicking on "Sign In" link
User is redirected to the app page by clicking the [Download on the App Store] button
User is redirected to the app page by clicking the [GET IT ON Google Play] button
User is redirected to the app page by scanning the QR-code
User is redirected to the Twitter page by clicking the [Twitter icon] button
User is redirected to the feedback form by clicking the [?] support icon button
User is able to view a short description of skills and achievements on each candidate card on the Candidates page
User should be redirected to the candidate's profile by clicking on the candidate card
User should be redirected to a new tab after clicking on the candidate card
User should be unable to view candidate contact details by default
User should be able to view candidate experience sorted from the oldest to the newest positions
Authorized Candidate is able to view a recruiter registration popup by clicking the [START CHAT] button
User should be able to expand detailed professional experience on the card by clicking the [Show experience] button
User should be able to load 10 additional candidate previews by clicking the [10 More] button
Authorized user should be able to apply for a vacancy by clicking the [1-CLICK APPLY] button
Candidate should be able to make their contact details visible by clicking the [Open contacts] button
Candidate should be able to reject a recruiter's proposition by clicking the [Decline] button

section.name: "Here you will have conversations about hiring" text info

case.title: Logged-in user without chat activity should be able to view the Mobile App Promo Section
User should be able to switch between Candidate and Recruiter accounts
User should be able to view their profile appearance by clicking the "Preview profile" link
Candidate should be able to activate their profile visibility in settings by clicking [Activate Profile] button
Candidate should be able to deactivate their profile visibility in settings by clicking [Deactivate Profile] button
User should be able to edit any registration data by clicking the "Edit profile" link
User should be able to connect their social profile by clicking the [CONNECT] button for LinkedIn
User should be able to connect their social profile by clicking the [CONNECT] button for GitHub
User should be able to connect their social profile by clicking the [CONNECT] button for Google
User should be unable to change password with an empty "Current password" field
User should be unable to change password by entering invalid data into the "Current password" field
User should be unable to change password if data in "New password" and "Repeat new password" fields do not match
User should be unable to change password with an empty "New password" field
User should be unable to change password with an empty "Repeat new password" field
User should be able to change their password by filling in all required fields with valid data and clicking the [SAVE CHANGES] button
User should be able to log out of the account by clicking the "Sign out" link
Authorized Recruiter should be able to send a message to a candidate from the candidate's profile page
User should see the "CV and contacts are hidden. To make them visible, send a message to the candidate" message instead of contact details
Authorized Recruiter with an active message thread should be able to view candidate contact details
Authorized Recruiter is able to view the "Send connection request" popup by clicking the [START CHAT] button
Authorized Recruiter is able to send a connection message by clicking the [Send message] button
Authorized Recruiter should see a candidate registration popup after clicking the [1-CLICK APPLY] button on the job page
Authorized Recruiter should be able to post a job manually by clicking the [Add job manualy] button
Authorized Recruiter should be able to post a job using import from ATS by clicking the [Import job from ATS] button
Authorized Recruiter should be able to track the number of contacted candidates via the Circular progress bar
User should be able to delete a chat by clicking the [Delete] button
User should be able to move a chat to the archive by clicking the [Archive] button

section.name: CV and contacts are hidden info text

case.title: Authorized Recruiter should be able to hire a candidate by clicking the [Hire candidate] button
Authorized Recruiter should be able to reject a candidate by clicking the [Reject candidate] button
User should be able to send a chat message by clicking the [Send message] button
User should be able to navigate to the candidates page by clicking the [Search Engineers] button
User should be able to navigate to the chat page by clicking the [Chat icon] button
User should be able to reject a candidate by clicking the [REJECTED] button
User should be able to hire a candidate by clicking the [HIRED] button
User should confirm actions regarding the candidate by clicking the [SUBMIT] button
User should be able to create and save custom filters
User should be able to create and save personal message templates

section.name: No message templates yet info text
